title: Create Tickets from Design Document
description: Read @IxdarDesignDocument.md and create tickets for every idea in the document
definition-of-done: There are tickets for every idea in the design document with descriptions of how we can implement each one, which tickets block which tickets, titles, and unique ids, in ./tickets, each ticket has a definition of done and a testing plan
todos: Create minimal web interface for viewing tickets
unknowns: What interface do we want to use to display the tickets
completion-notes: Created 85 tickets across 12 epics: WORLD (9), SURV (8), ROAD (8), TRADE (10), ECON (8), INVEST (8), SMUG (5), SPY (7), DIPLO (8), PIRATE (5), UI (4), CORP (5). All tickets include descriptions, blocked-by/blocks relationships, definition-of-done, testing-plan, todos, and unknowns. Epic index stored in epics.json.
